ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fire_smoke_data" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time interval */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this time interval belongs to */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time interval in seconds */,
  "fed_o2_co2_co" REAL /* FED for oxygen, carbon dioxide, and carbon monoxide */,
  "fed_asphyxiants" REAL /* FED for asphyxiants */,
  "fed_irritants" REAL /* FED for irritants */,
  "fed_all" REAL /* Overall FED */,
  "fic_o2_co2_co" REAL /* FIC for oxygen, carbon dioxide, and carbon monoxide */,
  "fic_asphyxiants" REAL /* FIC for asphyxiants */,
  "fic_irritants" REAL /* FIC for irritants */,
  "fic_all" REAL /* Overall FIC */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions (temperature, humidity, pressure) in JSON format */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* ID of the sensor used to collect the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality rating or flag */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_smoke_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the experiment */,
  "publications" TEXT /* Information about publications related to the experiment in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this access is related to */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time interval being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access in JSON format */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES fire_smoke_data ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the simulation model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation model */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation model used */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this result is related to */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time interval for the result */,
  "fed_o2_co2_co" REAL /* FED for oxygen, carbon dioxide, and carbon monoxide */,
  "fed_asphyxiants" REAL /* FED for asphyxiants */,
  "fed_irritants" REAL /* FED for irritants */,
  "fed_all" REAL /* Overall FED */,
  "fic_o2_co2_co" REAL /* FIC for oxygen, carbon dioxide, and carbon monoxide */,
  "fic_asphyxiants" REAL /* FIC for asphyxiants */,
  "fic_irritants" REAL /* FIC for irritants */,
  "fic_all" REAL /* Overall FIC */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the result validation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES simulation_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES fire_smoke_data ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment for which the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation model used in the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, published) */,
  "sharing_status" TEXT /* Whether the report is shared with external stakeholders (e.g., public, private) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES simulation_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment for which the collaboration is related */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
